Bash(node -e "const JSZip=require\('jszip'\);const fs=require\('fs'\);\(async\(\)=>{const buf=fs.readFileSync\('C:/Users/53115/Desktop/恒众易/福利礼品项目/供应链管理/仟礼寻/\(已瘦身\)仟礼寻食品端午资料2026.xlsx'\);const zip=await JSZip.loadAsync\(buf\);const sf=Object.keys\(zip.files\).filter\(f=>/^xl\\/worksheets\\/sheet\\d+\\.xml$/.test\(f\)\);for\(const f of sf\){const xml=await zip.files[f].async\('text'\);const guids=new Set\(\);const re=/DISPIMG\\\(/gi;let m;while\(\(m=re.exec\(xml\)\)!==null\)guids.add\(m[0]\);const rows=\(xml.match\(/<row[^>]*>/g\)||[]\).length;console.log\(f+': '+rows+' rows, '+guids.size+' DISPIMG'\);}console.log\('Media files: '+Object.keys\(zip.files\).filter\(f=>f.startsWith\('xl/media/'\)\).length\);}\)\(\);")
Bash(node split-xlsx.js "C:/Users/53115/Desktop/恒众易/福利礼品项目/供应链管理/仟礼寻/\(已瘦身\)仟礼寻食品端午资料2026.xlsx" --sheets 目录)
